10536960.title: Ghosts
10536960.description: Alison and Mike, a cash-strapped young couple struggling to buy their first home, think their prayers are answered when a distant relative bequeaths them a sprawling estate. However, the old house is haunted by the ghosts of its former inhabitants.

10539429.title: Ghosts

10611848.title: Ghosts
10611848.description: Fortune smiles on a cash-strapped Mike and Alison when a TV company comes calling looking for an old house in which to film their period drama. To get the money in the bank, Alison must ensure the shoot goes without a hitch.
